subject: IBAS Alert n. 4144: not a GRB
body:
S.Mereghetti (IASF-Milano) and N.Mowlavi (ISDC- Versoix) on behalf of the 
IBAS Localization Team communicate 

IBAS Alert n. 4144 is not due to a GRB.  It has been caused by a known 
source. The attitude information was incorrect at the time of the trigger.
